title: Optimize Docker build by predownloading ROCm tarball
description: Optimize the Docker build process by predownloading the large ROCm tarball to avoid downloading it during the build process, and update the Dockerfile to use the local file instead of wget.

title: Update Dockerfile to use local tarball
Fix vLLM git checkout command in Dockerfile
description: Line 74 in Dockerfile has `git checkout -b v0.16.0rc0` but v0.16.0rc0 is a tag not a branch. Should be `git checkout v0.16.0rc0`.

title: Build and debug the Docker container
description: Debug the Docker container build process. Three phases: (1) ROCm tarball extraction, (2) vLLM installation, (3) flash-attention compilation for gfx12. Worker will investigate build errors and fix issues.
